id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-62" value="Graphics exist on the Cartridge and not on the NES itself" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="510" y="240" width="260" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-63" value="<div>VRAM (<i>identifies which tiles to draw in the background)</i><br></div><div>2KB<br></div>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="290" width="140" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-65" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" target="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-63"> id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-66" value="$0000 - $1FFF" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="370" width="90" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-67" value="$3F00 - $3FFF" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="370" width="90" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-68" value="Palletes (<i>graphics in NES where 2 bits / pixel and this bits were indexed in palletes)<br></i>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="290" width="140" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-69" value="Object Attribute Memory (<i>stores location of sprites)</i>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="550" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-70" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="445" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-28" value="<div align="left">At every clock cycle PPU&nbsp; adds a pixel onto the screen<br></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-70"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="15" width="130" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-41" value="" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-70"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="30" y="-115" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="30" y="55" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-42" value="PIXEL" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;rotation=270;" vertex="1" parent="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-70"> <mxGeometry x="-15" y="15" width="60" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-71" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-69"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="510" y="420" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="280" y="580" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-74" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="260" width="110" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-38" value="<div align="left">CPU and PPU runs at different clock speeds</div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-74"> <mxGeometry y="50" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-72" value="3 x <i>freq. of CPU</i>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-74"> <mxGeometry width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-76" value="" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-69" target="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-78"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="390" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="380" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-77" value="<div align="right">CPU calculates movement and location of sprites. It is slower than PPU and would fail to update OAM at required pace.<br></div><br>A primitive DMA implementation in NES, removes the need of CPU in memory access for OAM updates." style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-250" y="445" width="250" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-78" value="DMA" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="445" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-79" value="" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-78"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="390" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-19" value="CARTRIDGE" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="80" width="360" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-20" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" target="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-19"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="790" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="170" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-81" value="MAPPERS" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="130" width="120" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-16" value="Audio Processing Unit" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="80" width="140" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-17" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" target="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-16"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="520" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="370" y="170" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-18" value="$4000 - $4017" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="160" width="90" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-1" value="MEMORY (2KB)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="295" y="80" width="140" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-13" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" target="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="365" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="285" y="250" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-15" value="$0000 - $07FF" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="265" y="160" width="90" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SkG9yy90yHnfoJzwEf1u-82" value="<div align="left"><i>Mappers are devices used for "<b>BANK SWITCHING</b>", essentially allowing to store different data on same address ranges.<br></i></div>&nbsp;<i>Eg: different levels on different banks, we only change address mapping to different memory location in cartridge. The CPU and PPU bus see no change, but the mapper delivers different data.<br></i>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="20" width="340" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
CPU calculates movement and location of sprites. It is slower than PPU and would fail to update OAM at required pace.
A primitive DMA implementation in NES, removes the need of CPU in memory access for OAM updates.

div.i: Mappers are devices used for "BANK SWITCHING", essentially allowing to store different data on same address ranges.
Eg: different levels on different banks, we only change address mapping to different memory location in cartridge. The CPU and PPU bus see no change, but the mapper delivers different data.
